name: Ads Free Rewards
description: Auto-claim rewarded ad rewards without watching ads. WARNING: Enabling No Ads alongside this patch will prevent rewards from being claimed.

name: No Ads
description: Blocks ads: interstitial, banner, app open, MREC. Each ad type can be toggled individually. WARNING: Enabling Ads Free Rewards alongside this patch will cause it to NOT work (No Ads takes priority).

options.title: Block Interstitials
options.description: Blocks interstitial and app open ads.

options.title: Block Rewarded
options.description: Blocks rewarded ads. Disable this if using Ads Free Rewards patch.

name: Pairip Application Redirect
description: Changes AndroidManifest.xml to redirect Pairip's Application entry point to the real app's Application class, preventing Pairip from ever starting. Auto-discovers the real app class from Pairip's DEX if not specified manually.

options.title: Real Application Class
options.description: The real app's Application class name (e.g., com.example.app.App). Leave empty to auto-discover from Pairip's DEX.

name: Spoof Play Store Install Source
description: Makes the app think it was installed from Google Play Store. Recommended if the app has a Play Store license check.
